extraction.description: The screenshot shows the UiPath Integration Service for the folder/project "2-Way Matching" with the Connections tab selected. In the main panel, two existing connections are listed: a Data Fabric shared connection and a Gmail shared connection, both marked as default and showing a green Connected status. The left navigation shows My Workspace with the 2-Way Matching folder selected.
extraction.step_instructions: Informational screenshot — no user action required. It shows that in Integration Service, the "2-Way Matching" folder is selected and the "Connections" tab contains two active connections: "Shared Data Fabric Connection" and "Shared Gmail Connection," both in Connected status.
